meaning: n.割草,一次收割量,牧草地
examples: My long scythe whispered and left the hay to make "It returns us to the work of mowing."
He says in that next to last line, "It is the sweetest dream of labor, and it is the earnest love that is doing this mowing."
Before joining the Colorado Stars, Schmitz tended bar, waited tables and ran a lawn-mowing business.
Two of the bedrooms open onto terrace gardens so large their lawns require mowing.
